headline: Labcorp to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 30, 2026
summary: Labcorp Holdings Inc. (NYSE: LH), a global leader of innovative and comprehensive laboratory services, will release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 before the market opens on Thursday, July 30, 2026. The company will host a webcast beginning at 9:00 a.m. ET that day to discuss the results. The earnings press release and accompanying financial information will be posted on the "News & Events" section of the Labcorp Investor Relations website at https://ir.labcorp.com. A link
